title: Networked Players
description: Given two artists or releases, Networked Players shows a documented path through credited work — and explains every step. Collaboration, never inferred influence.

hero.headline: Trace the credits between two artists.
hero.lede: Networked Players finds a documented path through credited work — who played, produced, engineered, or sang on which release — and shows the evidence behind every step. It connects collaborators; it never infers influence.

focus.heading: Every connection carries its evidence.
focus.lede: An edge between two artists means they are credited on the same release or track. The path keeps that proof attached at every hop, with provenance back to the source.

cards.title: Documented credits only
cards.body: A shared credit proves documented participation — playing, producing, engineering, singing. It is never read as artistic influence, friendship, or lineage.

cards.title: Sourced and versioned
cards.body: Publishable facts derive from CC0 Discogs monthly dumps, carried with snapshot date, source, parser and schema versions, and original role text.

cards.title: Works with no backend
cards.body: The experience loads a small, versioned static artifact and runs entirely in your browser. No live API is required for the core experience.
